name: Frostpunk_RPG_version_2
description:
Frostpunk is a post-apocalyptic city-building simulator from the creators of This War of Mine. In the summer of 1886, snowstorms began. Harvests failed, people were starving. Millions of people fled to the south. There, chaos, hunger and death awaited them.

In the most remote corners of the resource-rich north, the British Empire began to build huge steam generators, where a select few could safely survive the chaos of a collapsing civilization.

They did not have enough time to assemble all the generators. An apocalyptic ice storm came from the south, devouring everything in its path. People died in panic. Some managed to cross the seas and find a generator.

The generator was intended as the heart of the city, capable of maintaining hope during the end of the world ... And you have to build this city.

In a completely frozen world, people develop steam technology to withstand the devastating cold. The city leader must manage both the citizens and the infrastructure in which the citizens live. The tactical skills of the leader are put to the test, often calling into question the morality and basic principles of what we consider an orderly society. This is where optimization and resource management often conflict with empathy and compassion. Although managing the city and society takes up most of the captain's time, at some point there is a need to study the outside world to understand its history and current state.

What decisions will you make in the name of survival? How will you behave in a critical moment? Who will you become?

I will be glad if you help, and I will be glad if you write in Russian (the chatbot is written in English, so it writes text better)

P.S

yes, I know. I have long promised to release a new bot, but I was busy. This bot has been improved, I hope you like it.
